cases.message_excerpt: Delete path is blocked: root MFA is not enrolled (AccountMFAEnabled=0). Enable root MFA before selecting root key delete.

cases.expectation: MFA=1 makes iam_root_key_delete selectable and create-run proceeds
execute_delete MFA=0 transitions to needs_attention with root_mfa_not_enrolled

notes: No root safety controls were bypassed.
B1 used staging/test-path simulation (runtime signal MFA=0 injection) because no connected live account with AccountMFAEnabled=0 was available in tenant-linked accounts.
B2 used live runtime probe + live AWS account summary evidence with AccountMFAEnabled=1.
B3 used isolated worker simulation with AccountMFAEnabled=0 to validate fail-closed execute_delete behavior.
Post-evidence cleanup: B2 test run 3b0a17e7-1a44-4948-b4db-b80066260af4 was cancelled to avoid leaving an active duplicate run.
